title: Tool Depot® 400pcs Tile Levelling System, 2mm 300 Pcs Tile Spacers Levelling Clips and 100 Pcs Reusable Wedges with Pliers - Tile Tools Set (2mm Kit)
description: Tool Depot Tile Levelling System includes:
features: Professional Tile Levelling System: Tile Installation Set - great tools for floor/wall setting. The system ensures a level finish & equal spacing between tiles. avoiding movements during the mortar setting.
Easy To Use: The Tile Levelling System helps DIY and Professional tile layers increase the efficiency of laying tiles and obtain a perfect finish every time.
Reusable Wedges: 100 wedges included, The wedge firmly holds the tile in place with the aid of the spacers, once dry the wedge is removed and can be re-used.
Tile Clips: Included in the kit are 300 spacers, allowing for a 2mm gap between tiles. When tile adhesive is dry, simply remove spacers with a rubber mallet and grout as normal.
Perfect results: Achieve high quality results with every project, fast, efficient, and time saving tool kit for professionals and DIYers alike.
breadCrumbs: DIY & Tools > Power, Garden & Hand Tools > Hand Tools > Masonry & Tiling Tools
